_comment: Single source of truth for what counts as a complete install. Read by pinokio.js (sidebar menu), mlx_ltx_panel.py (/status, /models, run-time job validation), and consumed indirectly by install.js + download_q8.js (whose `hf download` calls land files at the local_dir paths listed below). When the upstream model layout changes, edit ONE file.

repos.name: Gemma 3 12B (4-bit text encoder)
repos.blurb: Required. Encodes the prompt for the diffusion model.

repos.name: LTX 2.3 — Q8 (high-quality + FFLF)
repos.blurb: Optional. Unlocks High quality and keyframe (FFLF) interpolation.

env._comment: Marker that the venv exists. SHIP-BLOCKER history: we used to point at `bin/python3.11` but uv creates that as a symlink chain (python3.11 -> python -> ~/pinokio/cache/.../uv/python/.../python3.11). Pinokio's info.exists() check returned false on that chain, so the menu rendered Install instead of Start even after a complete install — confirmed by cocktailpeanut. Use `pyvenv.cfg` instead: it's a tiny ASCII file uv writes to every venv root, never a symlink, never moves. `bin/activate` is the same kind of plain file; we keep it as a secondary check. The bin/python3.11 entries stay last as a final fallback for older installs.
